sessionStart.powershell: if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash scripts/init-workspace.sh 2>$null } elseif ((Test-Path '.git') -or (Test-Path 'copilot-instructions.md') -or (Test-Path '.github')) { @('.github/sdd/features','.github/sdd/reports','.github/sdd/archive') | ForEach-Object { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $_ | Out-Null } }
